events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer JSON only. Need assess scenario: Motor circuits & disconnects, field condition: disconnect not within sight. Work tested/inspected. Reference NEC Art. 430. Need compare. NEC 430.102(B) requires disconnecting means within sight from motor and driven machinery location, unless meets exceptions (e.g., capable of being locked in open position and disconnect located elsewhere under qualified persons etc). In industrial site, disconnect not within sight likely fail unless exception applies. Scenario says observed field condition disconnect not within sight. Need decide fail. Risk high? Disconnect not within sight means cannot verify de-energization, lockout/tagout hazard, servicing. Critical? Could be high. Component condition installed-defective and non-compliant. Percent complete maybe 90? Work stage tested/inspected. Findings: disconnecting means not within sight of motor/equipment, violates NEC 430.102(B). Actions: relocate disconnect to within sight or install lockable disconnect meeting exception, verify with inspector/engineer. Rationale. References: NEC 430.102(B), 430.107 maybe. Need include all fields. sound_source etc default empty string/0/list. order empty list. workable empty list. value 0. event_time 0. rate 0. confidence 0.9. Ensure valid JSON.

events.label: response
events.text:
{
  "decision": "fail",
  "risk": "high",
  "work_stage": "tested/inspected",
  "component_conditions": ["installed-defective", "non-compliant"],
  "percent_complete": 90,
  "value": 0,
  "sound_source": "",
  "confidence": 0.9,
  "event_time": 0.0,
  "rate": 0.0,
  "order": [],
  "workable": [],
  "findings": [
    "Motor disconnect is not within sight of the motor and driven machinery location.",
    "Disconnect location does not provide ready visual confirmation that the circuit is de-energized for servicing."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Relocate the disconnecting means so it is within sight of the motor and driven machinery, or",
    "If relocation is impractical, provide a lockable disconnect that meets the NEC 430.102(B) exception and is documented on the approved drawings.",
    "Re-inspect and obtain approval before energizing or placing equipment in service."
  ],
  "rationale": "NEC 430.102(B) requires the motor disconnecting means to be within sight from the motor location and the location of the driven machinery, unless the specific lockable-remote exception is satisfied. The observed disconnect is not within sight and no exception is confirmed, creating a lockout/tagout and servicing hazard.",
  "references": [
    "NEC 430.102(B)",
    "NEC 430.107"
  ]
}
